description: Object group definitions for random object placement.

GroupName.description: Internal name of the object group (reference only)

Offset.description: Group ID used in levels.txt ObjGrp0-7 columns

ID0.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 0

DENSITY0.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 0

ID1.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 1

DENSITY1.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 1

ID2.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 2

DENSITY2.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 2

ID3.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 3

DENSITY3.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 3

ID4.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 4

DENSITY4.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 4

ID5.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 5

DENSITY5.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 5

ID6.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 6

DENSITY6.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 6

ID7.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 7

DENSITY7.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 7
